title: Workpack Group Metadata
description: Schema for group.meta.json — defines a group of related workpacks, their execution DAG, and parallelization constraints.

id.description: Unique group identifier, used as the group directory name.

summary.description: One-paragraph description of the group's purpose.

protocol_version.description: Protocol version. Must be 2.0.0 or higher for groups.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 date when the group was created.

owners.description: People or teams responsible for the group.

workpacks.description: Ordered list of workpacks in this group, with their execution order.

id.description: Workpack ID (must match a subdirectory name in the group).

execution_order.description: Execution phase number. Workpacks with the same number MAY run in parallel.

execution_dag.description: Formal execution DAG: edges and parallelization constraints.

phases.description: Execution phases. Workpacks within the same phase run in parallel; phases execute sequentially.

mode.description: 'serial' if only one workpack in the phase, 'parallel' if multiple can run concurrently.

description.description: Optional human-readable description of this phase.

edges.description: Directed edges: each entry is [from_workpack_id, to_workpack_id] meaning 'from' must complete before 'to' can start.
